title: Spectral Frequency
description: Paranormal investigation datapack inspired by Phasmophobia. Detect. Identify. Contain.
body:
# Spectral Frequency
**Paranormal Investigation Datapack for Minecraft 1.21.11**
*Beta 13.0 "Foundation"*
---
## 👻 About
Spectral Frequency transforms Minecraft into a paranormal investigation experience inspired by Phasmophobia. Hunt ghosts, gather evidence, manage your sanity, and contain anomalies before they claim you.
## 📊 Features
| Category | Content |
|----------|---------|
| Ghosts | 12 unique types with distinct behaviors |
| Tools | 12 investigation & survival tools |
| Evidence | 5 types to identify ghosts |
| Sanity | Mental state system affecting gameplay |
| Hunts | Ghosts can manifest and chase you |
| Containment | Capture ghosts with specialized equipment |
| Multiplayer | Up to 12 players supported |
### Ghost Roster
Whisper, Shadow, Wraith, Phantom, Shade, Specter, Poltergeist, Hollow, Revenant, Banshee, The Dread, Mare
### Tool Kit
EMF Detector, Spirit Box, Thermometer, Spectral Journal, UV Flashlight, Flashlight, Photo Camera, Motion Sensor, Containment Device, Warding Totem, Soul Incense, Investigator's Guidebook
## 📖 Beta 13 Highlights
- **Complete Restructure** — 334 functions across 11 clean folders, 428 total files
- **Tiered Performance Loops** — Scheduled intervals (1s/5s/30s) replace per-tick logic
- **Research Notes** — 12 unique lore documents piecing together the UMBRA story
- **Containment Specialist** — Challenge advancement for containing all 12 ghosts
- **Ghost Watching** — Ghosts observe investigators before acting
- **Debug & Uninstall** — Full debug toolkit and clean removal system
## ⚙️ Installation
1. Download the `.zip`
2. Place in `world/datapacks/`
3. `/reload` or restart
4. `/trigger sf.help`
## 🔗 Links
[Wiki](https://spectral-frequency.fandom.com/wiki/Spectral_Frequency_Wiki) • [GitHub](https://github.com/NateslPlayzzz/spectral-frequency) • [Discord](https://discord.gg/dfeujtj3cf)
---
*Nexus Labs • Nexus Productions*

*Something has been forgotten. 1.0 is coming.*
